title: Genya wakizashi from anime Demon slayer
description: Resource pack makes it possible to replace any sword with a Genya wakizashi from the anime Demon Slayer by renaming
body: OptiFine required! ( Rename Any sword to "Genya wakizashi" to use it. ) For support, download this resource pack from my website: [genya_wakizashi.zip](https://mineanimecreations.com/resource-pack/genya_wakizashi.zip) Discord server: discord.gg/z86yJcAZKc. Also check out my other packs: https://modrinth.com/user/MineAnimeCreations Resource pack makes it possible to replace any sword with a Genya wakizashi from the anime Demon Slayer by renaming
